description: Product description Product description Trio Pack feminine intimate deodorant delicate & Fragrant deodorant for freshness,150mL With Free Aloe Vera Lip Balm Beauty Formulas Feminine Intimate Deodorant Spray with Fresh Fragrance - 150ml Experience a refreshing and hygienic solution with the Beauty Formulas Feminine Intimate Deodorant Spray, designed to provide lasting freshness and comfort for intimate areas. Benefits Provides long-lasting freshness and daily confidence. Gentle, delicately scented spray for intimate comfort. Helps you feel clean and comfortable during menstruation, hot weather, or busy routines. Light fragrance that does not overpower. Ingredients & Formula Mild and suitable for sensitive skin. Supports intimate hygiene and freshness. Convenient spray design for quick application. How To Use Spray gently on the external intimate area after showering or cleansing. Avoid contact with eyes and broken or irritated skin. Ideal For Women seeking daily freshness and confidence. Extra comfort during periods, travel, or warm weather. Pro Tips Best used after a shower. Store in a cool, dry place to maintain freshness. Precautions For external use only. Do not apply to broken or irritated skin. Product Details 150ml spray bottle. Store in a cool, dry place. Ingredients Delicate & Fragrant Deodorant for Freshness Safety Warning Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Avoid contact with eyes, mouth, or broken skin. In case of accidental ingestion, seek medical attention immediately. If irritation, redness, or discomfort persists, discontinue use and consult a healthcare professional. Use only as directed and store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. See more
